name: Mexican Beef Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the meat.
2. Slice the meat across the grain into bite-size strips.
3. Sprinkle meat tenderizer over the meat.
4. In a 1 1/2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine beef and 1 tablespoon oil. Cover with waxed paper.
5. Cook on high (100 percent) power for 3 to 5 minutes or until the meat is done, stirring every 2 minutes.
6. Remove the meat, reserving drippings in the dish.
7. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons oil to the drippings. Stir in vinegar, salt, cumin, oregano, garlic powder, and red pepper. Cook, uncovered, on high power for about 30 seconds or until bubbly.
8. Add meat, hominy, onions, green pepper, and olives. Toss gently to coat.
9. In a large mixing bowl, combine the meat mixture, torn lettuce, and tomatoes. Toss gently to coat.
10. Spoon the mixture onto lettuce-lined plates. Sprinkle with cheese. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
